FluidR3_GM.description: High-quality General MIDI soundfont by Frank Wen. Clean, balanced, professional.

Timbres_of_Heaven.description: Rich, expressive GM/GS/XG soundfont by Don Allen. Lush orchestral, warm instruments.

SalamanderGrandPiano.description: Salamander Grand Piano V3. Superb 48kHz Yamaha C5 samples. The best free piano soundfont.

MuseScore_General.description: MuseScore bundled GM soundfont. Decent all-rounder, already installed.

bright_concert.description: Bright, clear concert grand. Crisp attack, good for classical and jazz.

warm_grand.description: Warm, rich grand piano. Fuller low end, softer attack. Romantic, intimate.

honky_tonk.description: Detuned, bright honky-tonk piano. Ragtime, saloon, playful.

salamander.description: Salamander Yamaha C5 grand. Beautiful, natural, detailed. The best free piano sound.

electric_classic.description: Rhodes-style electric piano. Mellow, bell-like. Jazz, soul, lo-fi.

electric_warm.description: Warm Wurlitzer-style electric piano. Vintage, slightly overdriven.

classical.description: Clean, focused classical clarinet. Even tone, good for chamber music.

warm_expressive.description: Warmer, breathier clarinet. More body in the chalumeau register. Romantic.

silver.description: Bright silver flute. Clear, singing tone. Classical, pastoral.

breathy.description: Softer, breathier flute. More air in the tone. Impressionistic, gentle.

classical.description: Focused, reedy oboe. Clear projection. Baroque, classical.

pastoral.description: Warmer oboe with more vibrato. Pastoral, lyrical.

bright.description: Bright solo violin. Clear, penetrating. Classical solos.

rich.description: Richer violin with more body. Romantic, expressive.

lyrical.description: Singing cello. Rich low register, clear upper register.

deep.description: Deeper, darker cello. More resonance in the C string. Dramatic.

lush.description: Lush, wide string ensemble. Romantic orchestral, cinematic.

chamber.description: Tighter, smaller string section. Chamber orchestra, baroque.

bright.description: Bright, assertive trumpet. Fanfares, classical, jazz lead.

muted.description: Muted trumpet. Soft, intimate. Jazz ballads, film noir.

noble.description: Noble, round French horn. Heroic, pastoral, orchestral.

bold.description: Bold, brassy trombone. Orchestral, jazz big band.

nylon.description: Nylon-string classical guitar. Warm, rounded. Spanish, classical.

steel.description: Steel-string acoustic guitar. Bright, jangling. Folk, country, pop.

baroque.description: Crisp harpsichord. Bright pluck, short decay. Baroque, early music.

church.description: Full church organ. Majestic, sustained. Sacred music, Bach.

jazz.description: Hammond-style drawbar organ. Warm, gritty. Jazz, blues, gospel.

orchestral.description: Deep orchestral timpani. Thunderous rolls, dramatic accents.

concert.description: Concert harp. Shimmering, ethereal. Glissandi, arpeggios.

sparkle.description: Celesta. Crystalline, magical. Nutcracker, fairy-tale moments.
